text: You people are all the same, completely worthless and stupid.
People from that country are inferior and should go back where they came from.
Shut up you pathetic loser, nobody wants to hear your garbage opinions.
That group of people is a disease on our society and needs to be eliminated.
Your ideas are trash and you should be ashamed for even suggesting them.
Those people are all criminals and they're ruining our neighborhood.
I wish something terrible would happen to people who think like you.
You're disgusting and everyone who knows you thinks the same thing.
Immigrants are stealing all our resources and destroying our culture.
What a complete waste of space you are, the world would be better off without you.
